entry.title: [BE] Memri TV & The Death of Zionist Propaganda
entry.summary:
Memri TV produced many viral memes - but did you know it was always an Israeli propaganda outlet? In this video I go over how the subtle propaganda of Memri worked, and how in the post-October 7th world it will never work again. Including a light rebuttal to an old video by the YouTuber Nick Crowley. Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada Subscribe to my Substack: https://ofpatmos.substack.com/ One-time donations: https://ko-fi.com/BadEmpanada Second Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCjY9R3_6sxfUViabj93Vnhw Follow me on Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/badempanada.com
Sources: [1] https://www.influencewatch.org/non-profit/middle-east-media-research-institute-memri/ [2] https://www.middleeastmonitor.com/20240717-israeli-ministry-funding-multi-million-dollar-disinformation-campaign-spreading-islamophobia/ [3] https://www.unrwa.org/2014-gaza-conflict [4] https://www.btselem.org/publications/202112_unwilling_and_unable [5] https://www.bbc.com/news/world-middle-east-24405715 [6] https://wearenotnumbers.org/the_story_of_my_brother_martyr_mohammed_alareer/ [7] https://euromedmonitor.org/en/article/6014 [8] https://www.theguardian.com/world/2025/aug/15/israeli-military-unit-reportedly-tasked-with-linking-journalists-in-gaza-to-hamas
Israel Palestine
00:00 Intro 04:31 How Memri Works As Propaganda 23:03 The Nick Crowley Part 48:44 Conclusion
entry.content:

entry.title: [BE] I Was Investigated by the FBI for Being Anti-Israel
entry.summary: The FBI investigated me for making anti-Zionist YouTube content, which led to a Federal Grand Jury investigation, no fly listing, and constant interrogations in international airports - and I'm not even American! The West is destroying free speech in the name of protecting the genocidal state of Israel from scrutiny. Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada Subscribe to my Substack: https://ofpatmos.substack.com/ One-time donations: https://ko-fi.com/BadEmpanada Second Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCjY9R3_6sxfUViabj93Vnhw Follow me on Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/badempanada.com

entry.title: [BE] How They Make You Zionist - The 'Pro-Palestine' Counterinsurgency
entry.summary:
There is a concerted normalization effort by the political establishment to convert supporters of Palestine into liberal Zionists, being carried out to mitigate the political fallout of the Gaza Genocide in the West. So far, this has been highly effective. It is imperative that we are aware of this and do the exact opposite to what they want us to do. In this video I outline how this works, using some of its most prominent participants as key examples. entry.title: [BE] Response to a Response on Guns, Germs & Steel
entry.summary: I was recently refuted by another YouTuber who responded to my 6 year old video on the very popular book, Guns, Germs & Steel by Jared Diamond. I felt compelled to respond to this response largely because I think it's a good opportunity to discuss historiography (how history is studied) and some things related to it, and also because I was bored. So here it is! Please do not go and comment on the other person's video, thank you. My original video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kq6EuZj4axA Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada Subscribe to my Substack: https://ofpatmos.substack.com/ One-time donations: https://ko-fi.com/BadEmpanada Second Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCjY9R3_6sxfUViabj93Vnhw Follow me on Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/badempanada.com
entry.content:
I was recently refuted by another YouTuber who responded to my 6 year old video on the very popular book, Guns, Germs & Steel by Jared Diamond. I felt compelled to respond to this response largely because I think it's a good opportunity to discuss historiography (how history is studied) and some things related to it, and also because I was bored. So here it is! Please do not go and comment on the other person's video, thank you.

entry.title: [BE] Myths of the Bosnian War
entry.summary:
The Bosnian War of 1992-1995 is one of the most misunderstood modern historical events. In this video I set the record straight. Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada Subscribe to my Substack: https://ofpatmos.substack.com/ One-time donations: https://ko-fi.com/BadEmpanada Second Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCjY9R3_6sxfUViabj93Vnhw Follow me on Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/badempanada.com
Sources (in order of first appearance) [1] Burn This House: The Making and Unmaking of Yugoslavia, Jasminka Udovicki & James Ridgeway. [2] https://web.archive.org/web/20111120214424/http://www.ushmm.org/wlc/en/article.php?ModuleId=10007332 [3] https://www.cambridge.org/core/journals/nationalities-papers/article/abs/anticipating-the-disintegration-nationalisms-in-former-yugoslavia-19801990/3843E2823CDB1F87A857BBECE64B8A01 [4] Economic reasons for the break-up of Yugoslavia, Viachaslau Yarashevich & Yuliya Karneyevab [5] https://www.theguardian.com/world/from-the-archive-blog/2019/mar/20/how-milosevic-stripped-kosovos-autonomy-archive-1989 [6] https://worldhistorycommons.org/serbian-academy-arts-and-sciences-sanu-memorandum-1986 [7] https://iwpr.net/global-voices/milosevic-ally-defends-belgrade-takeover-kosovo [8] Balkan holocausts?, David Bruce MacDonald. [9] https://www.icty.org/x/cases/karadzic/tjug/en/160324_judgement.pdf [10] https://hrcak.srce.hr/file/151907 [11] https://www.hlc-rdc.org/en/publications/dossier-the-jna-in-the-wars-in-croatia-and-bih/ [12] https://www.icty.org/x/cases/tadic/tjug/en/tad-tsojmcd970507e.htm [13] https://www.icty.org/en/content/prosecution-case-croatia-and-bosnia-and-herzegovina [14] https://www.icj-cij.org/index.php/node/140381 [15] https://asil.org/insights/volume-11-issue-9/ [16] The Issue of Genocidal Intent and Denial of Genocide: A Case Study of Bosnia and Herzegovina, Edina Becirevic. [17] https://www.cambridge.org/core/books/abs/western-intervention-in-the-balkans/bosnia/5712288681DD1BC9E4D18F279D585AD3 [18] https://pesd.princeton.edu/node/701 [19] Islam and Bosnia Conflict Resolution and Foreign Policy in Multi-Ethnic States, Maya Shatzmiller. [20] https://www.haguejusticeportal.net/Docs/HJJ-JJH/Vol_2(3)/The%20Foca_Fiori_EN.pdf [21] https://www.upi.com/Archives/1991/09/25/Security-Council-bans-arms-sales-to-Yugoslavia/2070685771200/ [22] Postwar: A History of Europe Since 1945, Tony Judt. [23] https://www.obscuredbalkans.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/OB2024KK-173-179.pdf [24] “Celebrating” Srebrenica Genocide: Impunity and Indoctrination as Contributing Factors to the Glorification of Mass Atrocities, Olivera Simic. [25] Intervention in Internal Conflict: The Case of Bosnia, Steven L. Burg. [26] https://archive.is/20221019135227/https://www.latimes.com/archives/la-xpm-1995-09-20-mn-47992-story.html [27] The Clinton Tapes: Wrestling History in the White House, Taylor Branch. [28] Addressing a “Tragic Legacy”: The Dayton Peace Accords [29] https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2025/8/6/separatist-bosnian-serb-leader-dodik-sacked-from-office-by-bosnia-officials [30] https://www.pbs.org/wgbh/frontline/article/timeline-ratko-mladic-and-his-role-in-war-crimes-during-the-bosnian-war/ [31] https://www.icty.org/x/cases/karadzic/trans/en/100301IT.htm [32] https://www.nbcnews.com/id/wbna35638938
00:00 Introduction 11:13 Myth 1: War Was Between Bosnia & Serbia 15:34 Myth 2: All Sides Were Bad 21:39 Myth 3: NATO Stopped Genocide 29:09 Myth 4: Serb Victim Narrative
entry.content:
The Bosnian War of 1992-1995 is one of the most misunderstood modern historical events. In this video I set the record straight.

entry.title: [BE] The REAL Cuba Tourists Don't See
entry.summary:
I travelled to Cuba to see how the USA's blockade on fuel is affecting the Cuban people & to learn more about them and their struggles. Here's what happened. entry.title: [BE] Holocaust Education Is for Israel
entry.summary:
Why are we so uniquely aware of the Holocaust? In this video I explain how this oversaturation is the result of a project that is, in large part, intended to make people more sympathetic to Israel. Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada Subscribe to my Substack: https://ofpatmos.substack.com/ One-time donations: https://ko-fi.com/BadEmpanada Second Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCjY9R3_6sxfUViabj93Vnhw Follow me on Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/badempanada.com

entry.title: [BE] This is Zionist Propaganda - The TRUTH About Modern Hebrew
entry.summary:
Linguistics YouTuber 'Languagejones' made a video claiming to be debunking propaganda about the reconstruction of modern Hebrew. In truth, it's very generic, entirely unsourced pro-Israel propaganda. Here I respond to it, explain how modern Hebrew actually came about, and refute a bunch of the other tired old Zionist arguments that he makes throughout the video. The 'reconstruction' of modern Hebrew was a very intentional, nationalistic, colonialistic, political endeavour, and his video is based around attempting to deny this reality by talking about just about everything EXCEPT how and why the reconstruction movement actually formed. Original video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=n0x8sH0M9CE Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada Follow me on Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/badempanada.com Become a member on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/BadEmpanada/join One-time donations: https://ko-fi.com/BadEmpanada Second Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCjY9R3_6sxfUViabj93Vnhw
languagejones israel zionism ben yehuda modern hebrew

entry.title: [BE] Requiem for Chomsky
entry.summary:
Noam Chomsky was the most prominent left-wing intellectual in the West for over 50 years. Recent revelations about his relationship with Jeffrey Epstein may complicate this legacy. In this video I take a look at Chomsky, aspects of his career, and what we can learn from it. I also investigate common claim made against him by his detractors (that he is a 'Genocide Denier' regarding Cambodia, Bosnia, and Rwanda). Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada Follow me on Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/badempanada.com Become a member on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/BadEmpanada/join One-time donations: https://ko-fi.com/BadEmpanada Second Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCjY9R3_6sxfUViabj93Vnhw

entry.title: [BE] How Graham Platner Exposes the U.S. Left
entry.summary:
Many on the U.S. left believe that killing the world's poorest people for money is fine, and that those who do it bare no responsibility whatsoever - provided they're American. This video explores this common tendency by analyzing recent controversy surrounding Democratic Party U.S. Senate candidate Graham Platner, a proud & unrepentant occupier of Iraq & Afghanistan and Blackwater mercenary. We will look at & refute the defenses of him by many American self-styled leftists, progressives, and anti-imperialists. Used as examples are Hasan Piker, Chapo Trap House, Breaking Points (Krystal Ball & Ryan Grim), and the Majority Report (Sam Seder & Emma Vigeland) - but there have been many more. entry.title: [BE] Israel's Gaza Genocide, Legally Proven

This video was originally uploaded in January 2024 and has been re-uploaded to fix some errors and due to the continued relevance of its analysis of legal precedents. It is actually even more relevant now, as there is way more evidence available now than at the time this video was made. entry.title: [BE] Racism in Argentina: Myth vs Reality From 'Nazi Argentina' to 'Black Genocide'
entry.summary:
For some reason, people really like to talk about racism in Argentina. Aside from football, it's basically all that English speakers seem to think about regarding the country. So in this video I explore some of the common misconceptions on the topic (like the 'Nazi Argentina' and 'Black Genocide' tropes), then provide a comparative historical overview, and finally discuss what things are like today - and how they have recently been getting worse under current president Javier Milei. Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada Follow my Instagram: https://instagram.com/BadEmpanada Become a member on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/BadEmpanada/join One-time donations: https://ko-fi.com/BadEmpanada Second Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCjY9R3_6sxfUViabj93Vnhw
VIDEOS MENTIONED IN THIS VIDEO: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8mFeQ6gIfgg https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OaJDc85h3ME https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=R1gcipAvplY https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EeCu8pMHma0
Sources in pinned comment as the list is too long to fit into the description.

entry.title: [BE] Jewish Exceptionalism, Liberal Zionism, Jewish Supremacy - How YOU Inadvertently Support Israel
entry.summary:
There is a subtle ideology in Western society that leads many people to believe that certain types of Zionism are actually pro-Palestinian, leading well meaning people astray from truly understanding the root causes of the Palestinian problem and rendering them incapable of ever effectively fighting them. It's called Jewish exceptionalism, and in this video I dissect everything about it. In particular I address arguments from one of its most prominent 'left-wing' proponents over the last decade, Owen Jones. Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada Follow my Instagram: https://instagram.com/BadEmpanada Become a member on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/BadEmpanada/join One-time donations: https://ko-fi.com/BadEmpanada Second Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCjY9R3_6sxfUViabj93Vnhw

entry.title: [BE] How Kraut Helped Fascists Who Tried to Murder Me
entry.summary:
This video is a wild ride which outlines how I was targetted for attempted mvrder by the Argentine far right & pro-Israel doxxing groups, and how the YouTuber Kraut is now attempting to frame the people who did this to me as actually being MY victims to get back at me for what he believes to be my directing of an elaborate, 6 year long gangstalking operation against him. He has formed a Discord server dedicated to stalking me, doxxing me, and 'gathering evidence of my crimes', and is threatening me with 'handing it all over' to drama YouTubers who, according to him, are going to make videos on me, which he thinks is something I should be very afraid of. entry.title: [BE] The Appeal to Jewishness Fallacy, Explained & Dismantled
entry.summary: One of the bedrocks of present day pro-Israel propaganda, incredibly pervasive in Western countries in particular, is the idea that there's something exceptional about Jewish people that therefore uniquely justifies Israel & its atrocities - which is in turn weaponized to brand anyone who refuses to accept such a notion as 'Anti-Semitic'. In this video I dissect a great example of this sort of argument from Zionist YouTuber 'LonerBox' & outline how clearly invalid it is when you lay it out and think about it even slightly. Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada Follow my Instagram: https://instagram.com/BadEmpanada Become a member on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/BadEmpanada/join One-time donations: https://ko-fi.com/BadEmpanada Second Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCjY9R3_6sxfUViabj93Vnhw

entry.title: [BE] The Nakba, The Partition & "The Expulsions" - Zionist Myths Refuted
entry.summary:
In this response to Ethan & Hila Klein, I go over three key topics related to 1948, the core of the Palestinian question, the nature of Zionism, & how and why they are distorted by Zionists like these two: the Nakba, the Partition, and the myth of "mass, uniform Jewish expulsion from Arab countries." I also touch on things like Arab Jewish culture (and its erasure), Israel as a European Jewish supremacist project, and how Zionists cynically use Arab Jews - and even Arab food - as little more than a tool against Palestinians. Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada Follow my Instagram: https://instagram.com/BadEmpanada Become a member on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/BadEmpanada/join One-time donations: https://ko-fi.com/BadEmpanada Second Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCjY9R3_6sxfUViabj93Vnhw
Sources: [1] https://www.aljazeera.com/features/2017/5/23/the-nakba-did-not-start-or-end-in-1948 [2] https://www.palquest.org/en/highlight/159/un-partition-plan-29-november-1947 [3] https://www.jstor.org/stable/3993428 [4] Israel and the Gaza Strip: The First Decade 1947-1957, Amon Golan. [5] https://www.timesofisrael.com/virgin-atlantic-removes-palestinian-from-couscous-description/ [6] The Invention of the Mizrahim, Ella Shohat. [7] 1949, The First Israelis, Tom Segev. [8] https://www.middleeasteye.net/big-story/truth-behind-israeli-propaganda-expulsion-arab-jews [9] Sephardim in Israel: Zionism from the Standpoint of Its Jewish Victims, Ella Shohat. [10] https://prrn.mcgill.ca/research/papers/shenhav.htm
00:00 Intro 02:10 The Nakba & The Partition 11:00 Collective Arab Responsibility Narrative 14:30 Arab Jews As a Tool For Zionism/Cultural Appropriation 27:30 The "Mass Uniform Expulsion" Narrative

I also touch on things like Arab Jewish culture (and its erasure), Israel as a European Jewish supremacist project, and how Zionists cynically use Arab Jews - and even Arab food - as little more than a tool against Palestinians.
